paper_title: Biology of E. formosa and sampling

methods.method_name: Sampling of E. formosa and Outgroup Species
methods.description: This method describes the collection and preservation of E. formosa damselflies and outgroup species for genetic analysis.

steps.description: One hundred and fifty nine E. formosa individuals from 32 sites, representing 27 major rivers and streams throughout Taiwan, were sampled.
steps.searchable_summary: collect E. formosa samples from various sites in Taiwan

steps.description: Voucher specimens were preserved in 95% ethanol and stored at -80°C in Tunghai University.
steps.searchable_summary: preserve and store E. formosa specimens

steps.description: For outgroups, five Euphaea species from Southeast Asia were used.

methods.description: This method outlines the process of extracting DNA from E. formosa samples, amplifying specific genes, sequencing, and aligning the sequences for phylogenetic analysis.

steps.description: DNA was extracted from insect thoracic muscle using the standard CTAB, pheno-chloroform protocol, followed by ethanol precipitation.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA using CTAB and phenol-chloroform protocol

steps.description: The primers C2-J-3102 and Euphaea-specific C2-N-3740 were used to amplify the COII gene.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify COII gene using specific primers

steps.description: A eukaryote-specific 18SF/28SR primer set was used to amplify ITS1, ITS2 and 5.8S genes.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify ITS1, ITS2, and 5.8S genes using eukaryote-specific primers

steps.description: PCR reactions were performed in an Ependorf thermocycler with specific conditions for COII and ITS.
PCR products were purified using a Gel/PCR DNA Fragments Extraction Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: purify PCR products using extraction kit

steps.description: Positive clones were confirmed by performing PCR reactions using M13F/ M13R primers.
steps.searchable_summary: confirm positive clones with M13 primers

steps.description: Plasmid DNA was sequenced in both directions on an ABI PRISM™ 377 automatic sequencer.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence plasmid DNA using ABI PRISM 377

steps.description: Manually inspected and edited DNA sequences from raw chromatograph data were aligned using the Clustal W method in MegAlign.
steps.searchable_summary: align DNA sequences using Clustal W

steps.description: COII sequences were translated into amino acid sequences using a mitochondrial genetic code of Drosophila in MacClade v.4.06.
steps.searchable_summary: translate COII sequences to amino acids using Drosophila code

steps.description: Thirteen paralogous ITS2 sequences with large indels were excluded from the analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude paralogous ITS2 sequences with large indels
